questions.questionText: Which OSI layer is responsible for translating data between application formatting and network encoding?
At which OSI layer do network routers primarily operate to forward packages?
What is the exact Protocol Data Unit (PDU) name processed at Layer 2 of the OSI model?
Which of the following network infrastructure components is bounded strictly to Layer 1 operations?

questions.correct: End-to-end communication flow control, segmentation, and error checking
questions.questionText: What is the core responsibility of Layer 4 (Transport Layer) inside connection pipelines?
wrong: Logical path selection across separate routing nodes
Mapping human-readable domains to server IP values

questions.questionText: How many total bit blocks form a standard IPv4 address structure?
What is the default private IP address range category bounded to Class A network topologies?
If a host configuration has an IP of 192.168.1.50 with a subnet mask of /26, how many hosts are available?

questions.correct: To discover the physical MAC address matching a known logical IP address
questions.questionText: What is the primary role of the Address Resolution Protocol (ARP) inside a subnet?
wrong: To assign dynamic IP configurations automatically
To forward data packages across different global public networks

questions.questionText: Which mechanism enables multiple private local network clients to share a single public IP mapping parameter?
Which of the following routing protocols operates as an Exterior Gateway Protocol (EGP) to handle internet traffic?
What metric parameter does the Routing Information Protocol (RIP) utilize to determine the best path?
What classification defines the Open Shortest Path First (OSPF) routing protocol engine?

questions.correct: The destination path used for traffic traveling outside the local network subnet boundary
questions.questionText: What is the role of a default gateway entry inside a client machine's routing profile?
wrong: The physical hardware switch port connected to the line
The backup DNS server utilized when primary queries fail
The local database server recording updates

questions.questionText: What algorithm forms the mathematical engine used by OSPF to compute shortest path trees?
What flag sequence handles a standard connection teardown/closure inside TCP transport logic?

questions.correct: Connectionless, lightweight, and lacks delivery guarantees or sequencing
questions.questionText: Which of the following traits characterizes the User Datagram Protocol (UDP) data stream?
wrong: Reliable, connection-oriented, and features heavy window sizing flows
Operates exclusively inside Layer 3 routing tracks
Mandates manual packet handshakes before transmission

questions.correct: Dynamic flow control to regulate how much data a sender can transmit before an ACK is required
questions.questionText: What does the 'Sliding Window' mechanism accomplish inside a TCP session tracking pipeline?
wrong: Cryptographic block rotations to shield payload fields
Horizontal expansion of port bounds when traffic spikes occur

questions.questionText: What is the standard port allocation value for secure SSH remote shell terminal sessions?

questions.correct: The connection is instantly terminated due to an unrecoverable error mismatch condition
questions.questionText: What occurs when a TCP host triggers a Reset (RST) flag parameter inside its header field?
wrong: The sender requests a temporary pause in traffic flow
The receiver reports that a data segment contains corrupt checksum blocks
The pipeline starts a context synchronization sequence

questions.questionText: What type of firewall monitors the state of active connections to determine whether to block a packet?

questions.correct: It uses a public key to encrypt data and a matching separate private key to decrypt it
questions.questionText: How does Asymmetric Encryption handle session key setup operations?
wrong: It relies on a single shared symmetric key rotated periodically
It hashes password strings using random salt variables
It restricts traffic lanes to specific local MAC configurations

questions.questionText: What type of intrusion occurs when an attacker intercepts and modifies communications between two endpoints?

questions.correct: To isolate public-facing servers from the secure internal private network infrastructure
questions.questionText: What is the primary role of a demilitarized zone (DMZ) inside an enterprise network layout?
wrong: To host local user database management tables securely
To store system application logs data fields away from internet paths
To balance bandwidth distributions across edge switch routing points

questions.questionText: Which protocol encapsulates web traffic inside an encrypted SSL/TLS session framework layer?
